cardSubtitle: Soft Neoprene | Detachable Chain Crossbody Cosmetic Pouch
logo: Embossed Logo, Silk Screen Printing, Heat Transfer Printing, Custom Logo Method Available

title: Neoprene Puffy Quilted Crossbody Makeup Bag with Detachable Chain Strap
seoTitle: Neoprene Quilted Crossbody Makeup Bag | Detachable Chain Cosmetic Pouch
description:
Cloud-Soft Neoprene Material: High-density stretch neoprene fabric, shock-absorbent, water splash-proof, stain-resistant & fully hand washable; resists deformation after long-term use
Puffy Quilted Cushion Design: 3D padded stitching protects fragile makeup bottles and mirrors from bumps, embossed brand logo for premium texture
Detachable Metal Chain Strap: Quick-release clips let you switch between crossbody shoulder bag, wrist clutch or plain makeup pouch in seconds
Compact Yet Spacious Interior: Roomy open main compartment fits full-size skincare, makeup brushes, lip gloss and travel toiletries; smooth durable zipper for easy access
Ultra-Lightweight Portable Build: Slim silhouette slides easily into tote bags, backpacks or suitcases; available in multiple neutral & pastel colors
Multi-Scene Versatile Use: Daily makeup storage, travel cosmetic organizer, evening mini crossbody purse, handheld toiletry pouch
seoDescription: Soft puffy neoprene crossbody makeup bag with detachable chain strap. Compact yet spacious water-resistant travel cosmetic pouch for women daily & travel use. Shop now!
